subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! The first letter was answered the day before yesterday, and today the second letter likewise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان پریروز نامه اول را جواب مرقوم شد و الیوم نامه ثانی را نیز
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics, @review of publications, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
